title: pleurogyne carinthiaca var. pusilla
intro: Pleurogyne carinthiaca var. pusilla is a small flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
